ConfigMapV1.description: Kubernetes core/v1 ConfigMap accepted for customer VM startup configuration data. Mount Thor requires metadata.labels.vm.mountthor.dev/customer-bootstrap=true for customer create, update, patch, and delete.

namespace.description: Must match the namespace bound to the Mount Thor compute session.

x-kubernetes-validations.message: the same lease must not appear in both coLocateWithLeases and antiCoLocateWithLeases
